Plan: 2 to add.

Summary by type:
  functions: 1 to add
  aggregates: 1 to add

Functions:
  + str_append

Aggregates:
  + str_concat

DDL to be executed:
--------------------------------------------------

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION str_append(
    text,
    text
)
RETURNS text
LANGUAGE sql
IMMUTABLE
AS $_$ SELECT $1 || $2
$_$;

CREATE AGGREGATE str_concat(text) (
    SFUNC = str_append,
    STYPE = text,
    INITCOND = ''
);
